description: IBM Cloud Logs DataPrime query templates for common log analysis scenarios

templates.name: error_hotspots
templates.description: Find which services have the most errors - start investigations here
templates.query: source logs | filter $m.severity >= ERROR | groupby $l.applicationname, $l.subsystemname | aggregate count() as error_count | orderby -error_count | limit 20
use_cases: Start incident investigation without prior knowledge
Prioritize which service to investigate first

templates.name: anomaly_detection
templates.description: Find services with unusually high error rates
templates.query: source logs | filter $m.severity >= ERROR | groupby $l.applicationname | aggregate count() as error_count | filter error_count > 10 | orderby -error_count | limit 20
use_cases: Find issues even in low-traffic services
Identify degradation before it becomes critical

templates.name: top_error_messages
templates.description: Group similar errors to find the most common problems
templates.query: source logs | filter $m.severity >= ERROR | groupby $d.message:string | aggregate count() as occurrences, min($m.timestamp) as first_seen, max($m.timestamp) as last_seen | filter occurrences >= 3 | orderby -occurrences | limit 30

templates.name: noise_filtered_errors
templates.description: Error analysis excluding health checks and known noise
templates.query: source logs | filter $m.severity >= ERROR && !$d.message:string.toLowerCase().contains('health') && !$d.message:string.toLowerCase().contains('ping') && !$d.message:string.toLowerCase().contains('heartbeat') && !$d.message:string.toLowerCase().contains('metrics') | groupby $l.applicationname | aggregate count() as errors | orderby -errors | limit 20
use_cases: Find real errors without health check noise

templates.name: traffic_overview
templates.description: See overall traffic patterns by service
templates.query: source logs | groupby $l.applicationname | aggregate count() as volume, approx_count_distinct($l.subsystemname) as components | orderby -volume | limit 20

templates.name: recent_changes
templates.description: Detect recent deployments or restarts that might explain issues
templates.query: source logs | filter $d.message:string.contains('start') || $d.message:string.contains('deploy') || $d.message:string.contains('version') || $d.message:string.contains('initializ') || $d.message:string.contains('shutdown') | groupby $l.applicationname | aggregate count() as events, min($m.timestamp) as earliest, max($m.timestamp) as latest | filter events >= 2 | orderby -latest | limit 20
use_cases: Find which services were recently deployed

templates.name: error_spike
templates.description: Find error spikes in the last hour grouped by application
templates.query: source logs | filter $m.severity >= ERROR | groupby $l.applicationname | aggregate count() as error_count | orderby -error_count | limit 20
use_cases: Identify which applications are producing the most errors

templates.name: error_details
templates.description: Get detailed error logs for a specific application
templates.query: source logs | filter $l.applicationname == '{APPLICATION}' && $m.severity >= ERROR | choose $m.timestamp, $m.severity, $l.subsystemname, $d.message, $d.error, $d.stack_trace | orderby $m.timestamp desc | limit 100
use_cases: Deep dive into errors for a specific service
Find error messages and stack traces

templates.name: error_timeline
templates.description: Error rate over time for trend analysis
templates.query: source logs | filter $m.severity >= ERROR | groupby roundTime($m.timestamp, 1m) as time_bucket | aggregate count() as errors | orderby time_bucket

templates.name: slow_requests
templates.description: Find slow requests with response time above threshold
templates.query: source logs | filter $d.response_time_ms > 1000 | choose $m.timestamp, $l.applicationname, $d.endpoint, $d.response_time_ms, $d.status_code | orderby -$d.response_time_ms | limit 50

templates.name: latency_percentiles
templates.description: Calculate latency percentiles by endpoint
templates.query: source logs | filter $d.response_time_ms > 0 | groupby $d.endpoint | aggregate percentile($d.response_time_ms, 50) as p50, percentile($d.response_time_ms, 95) as p95, percentile($d.response_time_ms, 99) as p99, count() as requests | orderby -requests | limit 20

templates.name: throughput_analysis
templates.description: Request throughput over time by application
templates.query: source logs | filter $d.request_id != '' | groupby roundTime($m.timestamp, 1m) as time_bucket, $l.applicationname | aggregate count() as requests | orderby time_bucket

templates.name: auth_failures
templates.description: Find authentication failures grouped by source
templates.query: source logs | filter $d.event_type == 'auth_failure' || $d.message:string.contains('authentication failed') || $d.message:string.contains('invalid credentials') | groupby $d.source_ip, $d.username | aggregate count() as failures | filter failures > 3 | orderby -failures

templates.name: privilege_escalation
templates.description: Detect privilege escalation attempts
templates.query: source logs | filter $d.event_type:string.contains('privilege') || $d.message:string.contains('sudo') || $d.message:string.contains('root access') || $d.message:string.contains('admin') | choose $m.timestamp, $l.applicationname, $d.username, $d.action, $d.message | orderby $m.timestamp desc | limit 100

templates.name: sensitive_data_access
templates.description: Track access to sensitive resources
templates.query: source logs | filter $d.resource:string.contains('pii') || $d.resource:string.contains('secrets') || $d.resource:string.contains('credentials') || $d.endpoint:string.contains('/admin') | choose $m.timestamp, $d.username, $d.resource, $d.action, $d.source_ip | orderby $m.timestamp desc | limit 100

templates.name: service_health
templates.description: Overall health summary by service
templates.query: source logs | filter $m.severity >= ERROR | groupby $l.applicationname | aggregate count() as error_count | orderby -error_count | limit 20

templates.name: heartbeat_check
templates.description: Verify services are logging (heartbeat)
templates.query: source logs | groupby $l.applicationname | aggregate max($m.timestamp) as last_seen, count() as log_count | orderby last_seen

templates.name: restart_detection
templates.description: Detect service restarts and crashes
templates.query: source logs | filter $d.message:string.contains('starting') || $d.message:string.contains('started') || $d.message:string.contains('shutdown') || $d.message:string.contains('terminated') || $d.message:string.contains('OOMKilled') | choose $m.timestamp, $l.applicationname, $l.subsystemname, $d.message | orderby $m.timestamp desc | limit 50

templates.name: top_endpoints
templates.description: Most frequently called endpoints
templates.query: source logs | filter $d.endpoint != '' | groupby $d.endpoint | aggregate count() as calls, avg($d.response_time_ms) as avg_latency | orderby -calls | limit 20

templates.name: user_activity
templates.description: User activity summary
templates.query: source logs | filter $d.user_id != '' | groupby $d.user_id | aggregate count() as actions, approx_count_distinct($d.endpoint) as unique_endpoints | orderby -actions | limit 50

templates.name: data_volume
templates.description: Log volume by application over time
templates.query: source logs | groupby roundTime($m.timestamp, 1h) as time_bucket, $l.applicationname | aggregate count() as logs | orderby time_bucket

templates.name: config_changes
templates.description: Track configuration changes
templates.query: source logs | filter $d.event_type:string.contains('config') || $d.message:string.contains('configuration changed') || $d.message:string.contains('settings updated') | choose $m.timestamp, $d.username, $d.resource, $d.old_value, $d.new_value, $d.message | orderby $m.timestamp desc | limit 100

templates.name: data_exports
templates.description: Track data export activities
templates.query: source logs | filter $d.action:string.contains('export') || $d.action:string.contains('download') || $d.message:string.contains('exported') | choose $m.timestamp, $d.username, $d.resource, $d.record_count, $d.destination | orderby $m.timestamp desc | limit 100

templates.name: api_key_usage
templates.description: Track API key usage patterns
templates.query: source logs | filter $d.api_key_id != '' || $d.auth_type == 'api_key' | groupby $d.api_key_id, $l.applicationname | aggregate count() as calls, approx_count_distinct($d.source_ip) as unique_ips | orderby -calls | limit 50
